that you made the decision that in the righteous gemstones, the gemstones are not con men. We kind of learned that when we were writing Eastbound. I remember when we pitched it, we were so enamored

you don't have a show. And that's the kind of stuff that my old writing partner, Greg Daniels, who's done a million great shows, Office, Parks and Recreation, and just to name a few. who plays my sister on the show. it's like a religious station. And, you know, I went to church when I was a kid, my family was pretty religious and it just got me thinking like, what is church like now?
